mapper.select: select * from bill order by bill_date desc
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bill ( title, description, bill_date, create_by ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{description}, #{billDate}, #{createBy} )

INSERT INTO bill_stat_month ( stat_month, create_by, total_amount, detail_count, max_amount ) SELECT DATE_FORMAT(consume_time, '%Y-%m-01') AS stat_month, create_by, IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0), COUNT(*), IFNULL(MAX(amount), 0) FROM bill_detail WHERE is_counted = 1 AND create_by = #{createBy} AND consume_time >= #{startDate} AND consume_time < #{endDate} GROUP BY stat_month, create_by ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_amount = VALUES(total_amount), detail_count = VALUES(detail_count), max_amount = VALUES(max_amount)

INSERT INTO bill_stat_month ( stat_month, create_by, total_amount, detail_count, max_amount ) SELECT DATE_FORMAT(consume_time, '%Y-%m-01') AS stat_month, create_by, IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0), COUNT(*), IFNULL(MAX(amount), 0), FROM bill_detail WHERE is_counted = 1
AND consume_time >= #{startDate} AND consume_time < #{endDate}
AND consume_time >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AND consume_time < DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m-01')
GROUP BY stat_month, create_by ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_amount = VALUES(total_amount), detail_count = VALUES(detail_count), max_amount = VALUES(max_amount)
